name: Meeting Notes
description: A local-first web application for capturing, organizing, and tracking action items from team meetings. Designed for teams who want a simple, fast way to record meeting outcomes and follow up on action items.

requirements.title: Meeting Management
requirements.description: Users can create, view, edit, and delete meetings. Each meeting has a title, date, attendees, and notes content.

stories.title: Meeting CRUD
stories.iWant: to create, view, edit, and delete meetings
stories.soThat: I can keep a record of all team meetings

acceptanceCriteria.given: I am on the meetings list page
acceptanceCriteria.then: a form appears where I can enter meeting title, date, attendees, and notes

acceptanceCriteria.when: I visit the meetings list page
acceptanceCriteria.then: I see all meetings listed with title, date, and attendee count
I can modify all fields and save the changes
the meeting is removed and I return to the meetings list

requirements.title: Action Item Tracking
requirements.description: Each meeting can have action items assigned to team members with due dates and status tracking.

stories.title: Action Item CRUD
stories.iWant: to create, view, update, and delete action items linked to meetings
stories.soThat: I can track follow-up tasks and their completion status

acceptanceCriteria.then: a form appears where I can enter a title, assignee, due date, and status
I see all action items listed with title, assignee, due date, and status badge

acceptanceCriteria.given: I am viewing an action item
acceptanceCriteria.then: the status updates immediately and the badge reflects the new state

requirements.title: Dashboard Overview
requirements.description: A landing page that shows a summary of recent meetings, upcoming action items, and overall team activity.

stories.title: Dashboard Summary
stories.iWant: to see a dashboard with meeting statistics and upcoming action items
stories.soThat: I get a quick overview of team meeting activity and outstanding tasks

acceptanceCriteria.then: I see the app name, description, and summary stats (total meetings, total action items, overdue items)

acceptanceCriteria.given: there are meetings in the system
acceptanceCriteria.then: I see the 5 most recent meetings with links to their detail pages

acceptanceCriteria.given: there are action items with upcoming due dates
acceptanceCriteria.then: I see upcoming and overdue action items highlighted

requirements.title: Search and Filtering
requirements.description: Users can search meetings by title or content, and filter action items by status or assignee.

stories.title: Search and Filter
stories.iWant: to search meetings and filter action items
stories.soThat: I can quickly find specific meetings or outstanding tasks

acceptanceCriteria.given: I am on the meetings list page
acceptanceCriteria.when: I type in the search box
acceptanceCriteria.then: the list filters to show only meetings matching the search term in title or notes
only action items with that status are displayed
